appointmentPrep.lt: Pirmam vizitui: atvykite 10-15 min anksciau. Atsinekite taptatybes dokumenta. Ruoskite klausimus is anksto.
appointmentPrep.en: For your first visit: arrive 10-15 minutes early. Bring a valid identity document. Prepare any questions in advance.

visitExpectations.lt: Registraturoje uzpildote anketa ir pasirasote sutarti; gali buti prasyta susipazinti su klinikos taisyklemis. Gydytojas atlieka apziura. Jei reikia, skiriama diagnostika. Gydymo variantai ir kainos aptariamos po ivertinimo. Tikslus gydymo planas ir kaina priklauso nuo individualios konsultacijos po apziuros.
visitExpectations.en: At reception you complete a questionnaire and sign the service agreement; you may be asked to read the clinic rules. The dentist performs an examination. Diagnostics may be prescribed if needed. Treatment options and prices are discussed after assessment. The exact treatment plan and fees depend on an individual consultation after examination.
